summary: P0 In-Product Guided Experience Re-test PASSED. ActionHelpButton fix verified - button now correctly renders in StoryVideoPipeline.js header (line 1222-1224) when phase==='input'. All guide drawers working correctly. 100% pass rate.

details: Button position: y=15 (in header area, inline mode - NOT floating)
Button is in page header next to back button, only shown when phase==='input'
All sections present: ag-steps (5 steps), ag-best-practices (3 bullets), ag-after-click, ag-avoid (3 bullets), ag-motivation
Primary CTA click closes drawer and stays on /app/story-video-studio
localStorage.guide_seen_story_video set to '1' when 'Don't show again' is checked (BY DESIGN - forced mode doesn't auto-set flag)
Video button click opens Story-to-Video guide
Guide drawer renders correctly with all sections
Enter Battle button [data-testid='hero-remix-btn'] found with 'Best for reach' badge
Checking 'Don't show again' + clicking CTA sets localStorage.guide_seen_story_video='1'
This is BY DESIGN: forced mode (via Help button) doesn't auto-set flag unless checkbox is checked

events: guide_opened - fires when guide drawer opens
guide_completed - fires when primary CTA clicked
started_after_guide - fires for story_video guide completion

critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: ActionHelpButton correctly placed in StoryVideoPipeline.js at line 1222-1224
ActionHelpButton renders inline by default (mode='inline'), positioned in header
Button only shows when phase==='input' (first step of wizard) - correct UX
localStorage behavior is BY DESIGN: forced mode (Help button) doesn't auto-set guide_seen flag unless 'Don't show again' is checked
All guide content (steps, best practices, after-click, avoid, motivation) renders correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 In-Product Guided Experience fully working. ActionHelpButton fix verified - button now renders correctly in StoryVideoPipeline.js header when phase==='input'. All 4 guide types (story_video, continue, remix, battle) working. localStorage flag behavior is intentional: forced mode (via Help button) doesn't auto-set flag to allow repeated access.
rca_of_the_issue: RESOLVED: Previous iteration 528 had ActionHelpButton added to wrong file (StoryVideoStudio.js instead of StoryVideoPipeline.js). The route /app/story-video-studio mounts StoryVideoPipeline.js, not StoryVideoStudio.js. Fix was to move ActionHelpButton to StoryVideoPipeline.js line 1222-1224, shown only when phase==='input'.
